---
title: "April Goals"
author: "Annabel Coxon"
date: "2006-04-03"
categories: [goals, daily-entries]
description: "April 2026 Goals"
image: ""
---

# Overview

April 2026 goals

## Goals

### Writing and Manuscripts

1. Something

### Analysis and Benchwork

### Funding

1. Finish taxon spreadhseet

### Other

2. Continue setting up digital notebook

# Primary Skill Building

- [ ] something
- [ ] something
- [ ] something
